rows.title: Linking to other assets from details view
rows.reason: B correctly identifies metadata as the workaround for linking related assets while A fails to engage with Dagster at all.

rows.title: "Network Configuration is not valid for the given networkMode of this task definition" error when using the EcsRunLauncher
rows.reason: A matches the reference's key run_task_kwargs override solution while B invents non-existent params and omits it.

rows.title: How to properly trigger a job once other are done?
rows.reason: Both use sensors correctly, but A has technical issues (raw dict filters, advance_all_cursors on wrong context type) while B's run-comparison logic prevents re-triggering and uses valid APIs.

rows.title: airbyte+ dbt + dagster: dbt upstream dependency issue
rows.reason: A correctly identifies the schedule only includes dbt assets and fixes by selecting all assets, matching the reference; B misdiagnoses since lineage already exists and Dagster won't auto-pull upstream for dbt-only selection.

rows.title: Create dynamic assets on runtime
rows.reason: The reference recommends partitions, which B implements correctly while A wrongly advises sticking with ops.

rows.title: Confused about code locations and kubernetes
rows.reason: Both miss the DefaultRunLauncher/customRunLauncher specifics, but B's in-process advice is consistent while A's Q1 config contradicts its own guidance.
